title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapped growth playbook from zero to $10M ARR in this interview. Topics include strategies for reaching $1M ARR in 117 days, reducing churn, product-led growth approaches, SEO and AEO tactics, warm outbound, pricing experimentation, and fundraising decision frameworks.
